name: jquery-fastsearch-suggest
description: A jQuery autocomplete / type-ahead plugin with ghost-text completion and a suggestion dropdown.

scripts.build: esbuild src/jquery.fastsearch-suggest.js --bundle=false --outfile=dist/jquery.fastsearch-suggest.js && esbuild src/jquery.fastsearch-suggest.js --bundle=false --minify --outfile=dist/jquery.fastsearch-suggest.min.js && cp src/jquery.fastsearch-suggest.css dist/jquery.fastsearch-suggest.css && esbuild src/jquery.fastsearch-suggest.css --minify --outfile=dist/jquery.fastsearch-suggest.min.css
